title: [Bug]: When using the SPACE function, executing the query results in an Internal error.
description: <!-- A clear and concise description of bug. -->
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_space (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value INTEGER, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_space (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test1', 10), (2, 'Test2', NULL), (3, 'Test3', 20);
SELECT id, REPLACE(' ', '', '') || ' ' || REPLACE(' ', '', '') || ' ' || REPLACE(' ', '', '') AS space_value FROM test_space WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_space WHERE value IS NULL OR value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM test_space WHERE name LIKE '%' || '   ' || '%';
key_bug_features: Executing query with SPACE function causes internal error
